name: Approve Products to List on Catch
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To list and sync products between Maropost Commerce and Catch you need to mark them as 'approved' in Maropost Commerce. This allows Maropost Commerce to update the price and stock levels on Catch, keeping them in sync with your other marketplaces."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Configure products to list on Catch by following the steps here."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Products in Maropost Commerce can be approved in three ways:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Individually"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In Bulk"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Using the Import Wizard"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "End a Catch Listing"}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Maropost Commerce cannot end or delete listings on your Catch account. If you unapprove products, they will no longer sync from Maropost Commerce, but will still be listed on Catch."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3",
